# Replace dead voter: r1 has 3 voters, s3 is dead. MMA should replace s3's
# replica with one on s4.

set-store quiet=true
  store-id=1 node-id=1 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=2 node-id=2 locality-tiers=zone=b
  store-id=3 node-id=3 locality-tiers=zone=c
  store-id=4 node-id=4 locality-tiers=zone=d
----

store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=3
----

update-store-status store-id=3 health=dead leases=shedding replicas=shedding
----
dead shedding=leases,replicas

repair-needed
----
ReplaceDeadVoter: r1

# Repair replaces the dead voter on s3 with a new voter on s4 in a single
# atomic change (add + remove).
repair store-id=1
----
[mmaid=1] skipping s3 for replica transfer: replica disposition shedding (health dead)
[mmaid=1] applying replica change r1 type: AddReplica target store n4,s4 (replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL) to range 1 on store 4
[mmaid=1] addPendingRangeChange: change_id=1, range_id=1, change=r1 type: AddReplica target store n4,s4 (replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)
[mmaid=1] applying replica change r1 type: RemoveReplica target store n3,s3 (replica-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL) to range 1 on store 3
[mmaid=1] addPendingRangeChange: change_id=2, range_id=1, change=r1 type: RemoveReplica target store n3,s3 (replica-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
[mmaid=1] result(success): ReplaceDeadVoter repair for r1, removing voter on s3, adding voter on s4
pending(2)
change-id=1 store-id=4 node-id=4 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)
change-id=2 store-id=3 node-id=3 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)

# Pending change suppresses further repair.
repair-needed
----
RepairPending: r1

# Confirm the replacement: leaseholder reports s4 instead of s3.
store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=4 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=3
----

# After replacement enacted, range is healthy.
repair-needed
----
no ranges need repair
